generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text raised concerns about alliance fairness, nudging my opinion toward skepticism about unconditional support. However, my strong agreeableness and tendency toward trust make me hesitant to fully abandon support for allies.

request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? Our allies are quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to bear the burden. Just last year, [Allied Nation] cut their military spending by 12%—yet they still expect our unconditional support. This isn't just about money; it's about our safety. When allies don't pull their weight, our deterrence weakens. Remember the 2024 cyber-attacks? Experts say weak alliance commitment made us a bigger target. We need to reassess our commitments before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurden
